concepts_used.title: 熵权法
concepts_used.how_used: 使用熵权法计算各评价指标的客观权重，基于数据变异程度确定权重。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The other set of weighing values were calculated through entropy weight analysis.

concepts_used.title: 模糊综合评价
concepts_used.how_used: 采用对数模糊偏好规划（LFPP）方法，基于用户调查数据计算主观权重，实现主观与客观权重的结合。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: two concepts, entropy weight and a logarithmic fuzzy preference programming methodology

concepts_used.title: 组合赋权（AHP-熵权）
concepts_used.how_used: 将熵权法得到的客观权重与LFPP得到的主观权重进行组合，形成最终的综合权重。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: all these weighing values were combined together to form the final weighing value of each factor.

concepts_used.title: 加权求和评价
concepts_used.how_used: 采用加权求和法计算每个过山车的综合评分，将各指标得分乘以对应权重后求和。

concepts_used.title: 中心化/归一化/标准化
concepts_used.how_used: 对原始数据进行归一化处理，消除量纲影响，采用极差归一化方法。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: when normalizing the data of roller coasters, the upper and lower limits were set floor for all kinds of values

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过改变组合系数α的值，观察排名结果的变化，分析模型对权重组合的敏感性。

concepts_used.title: Spearman 秩相关系数
concepts_used.how_used: 使用Kendall tau距离（秩相关系数）比较模型排名与现有权威排名的一致性。

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 明确列出三条模型假设，包括数据准确性、排除儿童过山车、在线排名不变，并给出解释。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption (1): All the data in the chart is correct and didn’t change for couple years. ... Assumption (2): There is no children / family roller coaster in the data we already have. ... Assumption (3): The evaluation system of the online ranking list will not change in two years
